# Jain Tours & Travels — Full Reference for AI Search

Last updated: 2026-06-14
Canonical URL: https://jaintoursonline.com
Maintainer: Jain Tours & Travels, Mumbai, India

## About

Jain Tours & Travels is a Mumbai-based travel agency and tour operator founded in 2008. The company designs fully-customised domestic and international holiday packages for Indian travellers, with a focus on premium experiences, transparent pricing, and end-to-end concierge service. The agency holds a 4.9-star average rating on Google with 142+ verified customer reviews.

## Contact

- Address: Shop No 06, 1st Floor, Vinay Kumkum Shopping Arcade, above Canara Bank, Kakaji Nagar, Jawahar Nagar, Goregaon West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400104, India
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 98212 35678
- Website: https://jaintoursonline.com
- Hours: Monday to Saturday, 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM IST (Sunday closed)
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jain_tours_n_travels
- YouTube: https://youtube.com/@jaintours99
- Service area: Booking origin India; destinations worldwide
- Languages spoken: English, Hindi, Marathi, Gujarati

## Services

1. Customised holiday packages — Hand-built itineraries for couples, families, friends, seniors, and solo travellers.
2. Honeymoon packages — Maldives, Bali, Mauritius, Andaman, Kashmir, Europe specialists.
3. Group tours — Fixed-departure escorted group tours throughout the year.
4. Pilgrimage tours — Char Dham Yatra, Vaishno Devi, Tirupati, Shirdi, Jain pilgrimages.
5. Corporate / MICE travel — Offsites, conferences, incentive travel, dealer meets.
6. Flights — Domestic and international air ticketing, including business and first class.
7. Hotels & resorts — Negotiated rates with luxury, boutique, and value-tier properties.
8. Visa assistance — Documentation guidance for Schengen, UK, USA, UAE, Thailand, Singapore, Japan, Australia, and more.
9. Travel insurance — Worldwide medical and trip-protection plans.
10. Cruises — International cruise bookings (Mediterranean, Caribbean, Southeast Asia) and Indian river/coastal cruises.
11. Airport transfers, car rentals, foreign exchange referrals.

## Domestic destinations covered

Andaman, Tamil Nadu, Goa, Gujarat, Kerala, Kashmir, Leh–Ladakh, Madhya Pradesh, North East India (Meghalaya, Assam, Arunachal Pradesh, Nagaland, Sikkim), Himachal Pradesh, Rajasthan, Uttarakhand, Char Dham, Delhi.

## International destinations covered

Europe (multi-country), Georgia, Hong Kong, Japan, Mauritius, Australia, Dubai (UAE), Thailand, Singapore, Malaysia, Bali (Indonesia), Vietnam, Maldives, Bhutan, Sri Lanka, Nepal, United Kingdom.

## Signature itineraries

- UK & Scotland — 6 nights / 7 days
- Amazing Bali — 7 days
- Vietnam Adventure Quest with Halong Bay — 7 days
- Unbeatable Vietnam — 8 days
- 2N Gabala + 4N Baku (Azerbaijan/Georgia)
- Scenic Shimla & Manali
- Amazing Dubai — 6 days
- Dubai Extravaganza — 6 days
- Fascinating Dubai with Abu Dhabi — 7 days
- 2N Phuket + 2N Krabi (Thailand)
- Premium 3N Phuket + 2N Krabi + 3N Bangkok
- Pattaya 3N + Bangkok 2N — 6 days
- Japan Extravaganza — 8N/9D
- Amazing Bhutan — 8 days
- Amazing North East — 6N/7D
- Royal Rajasthan Trio: Jaisalmer, Jodhpur, Udaipur
- Royal Rajasthan: Ranthambore, Jaipur, Jaisalmer, Jodhpur
- Char Dham Yatra
- 6N / 7N Hills and Wildlife of Uttarakhand

## Why customers choose Jain Tours & Travels

- 17+ years of operating experience (since 2008)
- Premium curation with transparent, itemised pricing
- Direct relationships with hotels and DMCs in major destinations
- Personalised support from enquiry through return — single point of contact
- Strong record with first-time international travellers and senior citizens
- 4.9★ Google rating across 142+ reviews
- Mumbai walk-in office for in-person consultations

## Frequently asked questions

Q: Where is Jain Tours & Travels located?
A: Shop No 06, 1st Floor, Vinay Kumkum Shopping Arcade, above Canara Bank, Kakaji Nagar, Jawahar Nagar, Goregaon West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400104.

Q: How do I get a quote?
A: Call or WhatsApp +91 98212 35678, submit the enquiry form at https://jaintoursonline.com/contact, or visit the Mumbai office Mon–Sat 11:00–19:00 IST. Quotes are typically returned within 4 business hours.

Q: Do you handle visas?
A: Yes — full documentation guidance and submission support for most major destinations including Schengen, UK, USA, UAE, Thailand, Singapore, Japan, and Australia.

Q: Do you book only from Mumbai?
A: No — guests can depart from any Indian city. The Mumbai office serves as the planning and operations hub.

Q: Are itineraries customisable?
A: Yes — every published package can be modified for dates, duration, hotel category, inclusions, and group size. Fully bespoke itineraries are also designed from scratch.

Q: What payment methods are accepted?
A: Bank transfer, UPI, debit and credit cards, and cheque. EMI options available on select credit cards.

Q: Do you offer group / fixed-departure tours?
A: Yes — group tours run year-round for popular destinations such as Kashmir, Ladakh, Bhutan, Europe, and Char Dham.

Q: How early should I book?
A: International trips: 45–90 days in advance for best fares and visa lead time. Domestic peak season (Dec, May–Jun): 30–60 days in advance.
